steps.title: Identify what both texts emphasize
steps.content: Both passages consistently focus on jazz as central to Ailey's work—through his musical collaborations with jazz legends (Text 1) and through how jazz principles shaped his choreography (Text 2).

steps.title: Apply the influence to the answer choices
steps.content: B directly states what both texts demonstrate: jazz fundamentally influenced Ailey's work. The other choices either make unsupported claims about dancers' or audiences' reactions (A and C) or introduce unsupported elements like multiple genres (D). That matches choice B — B is correct.
